name: Hammer
use: Drives nails into wood or metal

name: Saw
use: Cuts through wood and other materials

name: Wrench
use: Tightens or loosens nuts and bolts

name: Screwdriver
use: Turns screws to fasten or loosen

name: Flashlight
use: Provides portable light in dark areas

name: Generator
use: Converts mechanical energy into electrical power

name: Toaster
use: Browns bread slices using radiant heat

name: Iron
use: Removes wrinkles from fabric using heat

name: Lawn Mower
use: Cuts grass to a uniform height

name: Projector
use: Displays images or videos on screens

name: Scanner
use: Converts physical documents into digital files

name: Router
use: Directs data packets between computer networks

name: Scale
use: Measures the weight or mass of objects

name: Level
use: Indicates if a surface is horizontal

name: Microphone
use: Converts sound waves into electrical signals

name: Hinge
use: Allows doors and gates to rotate

name: Valve
use: Controls flow of liquids or gases

name: Filter
use: Removes particles from air or liquid

name: Grinder
use: Crushes or grinds material into powder

name: Chopper
use: Cuts food into small uniform pieces

name: Colander
use: Drains water from pasta or vegetables

name: Spatula
use: Flips or turns food during cooking
